rationale: Target home identified as the large complex hip-roofed residence near the image center (coordinates 30.1117, -95.5091). Bounding box traced from approximately x=435–650 (215 px = 45.6 ft) by y=385–685 (300 px = 63.6 ft), yielding a bounding area of 2,895 sq ft. Applied a 78% fill factor to account for multiple wing cutouts, recesses, and the complex multi-section plan shape, arriving at ~2,258 sq ft footprint. Roof is a fully hipped multi-section design (no gable rakes). Ridge estimated from 4–5 short ridge lines atop each hip section (~190 px total). Hip lines counted at ~14 diagonal edges across all sections (~810 px). Valleys counted at ~5 inward junction lines (~265 px). Eaves traced around the complex lower perimeter (~410 px). Confidence is moderate (0.43) due to the high complexity of the roof geometry and difficulty precisely resolving individual sections at this resolution.
